response.step_by_step_log: 1. Watched the entire video to analyze the content structure. 2. Identified four distinct promotional segments (Countdown Live, Fan Club, Pop-up Shop, Date Voice packs). 3. Evaluated all audio components in each segment. All segments featured background instrumental music with speech/narration. 4. Determined that there were no vocal song performances in any part of the video. 5. Constructed the JSON object reflecting the absence of vocal music.
response.global_summary: This video is a compilation of promotional segments for various Hololive production events and products, including the Countdown Live 2025-2026, the official Hololive Fan Club, an official pop-up shop, and a re-release of the 2023-2024 New Year Date Voice packs. Throughout the video, only background instrumental music is played; there are no vocal song performances.

scenes.description: Promotional title card and introduction for the Hololive production Countdown Live 2025-2026 event. Instrumental music is playing.
Promotional segment for the Hololive Official Fan Club, featuring narration by Sakamata Chloe and Mori Calliope. Background instrumental music plays while they explain the benefits.
Promotional still for the Hololive production official pop-up shop. Instrumental music plays in the background.

Promotional segment for the re-release of the 'YukuHolo 2023 / KuruHolo 2024 New Year Date Voice' packs, featuring dialogue from AZKi, Nekomata Okayu, Fuwawa Abyssgard, and Mococo Abyssgard. Instrumental music plays in the background.
